reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: The first 10 pages of the source document are entirely missing from the output. The JSON explicitly states 'Pages 1-11 unavailable' (though page 11 content is actually present as the first section). Slides 1-10, covering the title, agenda, FGDC background, GDA summary, and initial NC relationship slides, are omitted.
concerns.output_quote: The output begins with the content of Slide 11.

concerns.description: Image placeholder ratio 97%: 31/32 images are broken/missing (transparent 1x1 placeholders)
Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Significant content within several slides is omitted. On Slide 15 ('How is the NSDI Being Used?'), the descriptive labels for support functions (e.g., Assessment, Forecasting, Early Warning) and the sector labels (Agriculture, Hazards, Infrastructure, etc.) are missing. On Slide 18, the specific URLs for broadband mapping resources are omitted from the text elements.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Slide 15 diagram labels: 'Planning', 'Assessment', 'Monitoring', 'Forecasting', 'Early Warning', 'Policy & Compliance', 'Navigation', 'Modeling', 'Mapping', and sector names. Slide 18 URLs: 'broadbandmap.fcc.gov/home' and 'www.nconemap.gov/pages/broadband'.
concerns.output_quote: Section 5 (Slide 15) and Section 8 (Slide 18) lack these textual elements in their content lists.

concerns.analysis: The reading order is significantly corrupted. The source PDF begins with Slide 1 on Page 1, but the structured output's first section begins at Slide 10 (Page 11). The first 10 slides of the document are entirely missing from the primary content flow and are instead replaced by a placeholder section at the very end of the JSON declaring them 'unavailable'. This is a major structural failure as the start of the document is moved to the end as a summary disclaimer.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF starts with page 1: 'The National Spatial Data Infrastructure (NSDI)'.
concerns.output_quote: The first section in the JSON is 'NSDI: A Digital Infrastructure for the Nation' (Slide 10/Page 11). The missing content is referenced in the final section: '[Pages 1-11 unavailable]'.
concerns.location: Initial document sections and Final section (index 28).

concerns.analysis: The conversion has failed to include the first 10 pages of the PDF in the body content. The HTML output begins with the content from Slide 10 (PDF page 11). An error message at the end of the HTML confirms that pages 1-11 were not converted and are unavailable. This is a significant omission of the introductory and foundational sections of the document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains 37 pages, starting with the title slide 'The National Spatial Data Infrastructure (NSDI)'.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML document starts with the heading 'NSDI: A Digital Infrastructure for the Nation' (Slide 10) and concludes with a section titled '[Pages 1-11 unavailable]' which states 'Content from pages 1-11 could not be converted.'
concerns.location: Beginning and end of HTML document
